title: AN ACT NAMING THE EMERGENCY HOSPITAL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF LIGAO, PROVINCE OF ALBAY, TO PIO DURAN MEMORIAL HOSPITAL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 8027 / 62 OG No. 24, 5154 (June 13, 1966)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 4277, June 19, 1965 ]

AN ACT NAMING THE EMERGENCY HOSPITAL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF LIGAO, PROVINCE OF ALBAY, TO PIO DURAN MEMORIAL HOSPITAL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The emergency hospital in the Municipality of Ligao, Province of Albay, shall hereafter be known as the Pio Duran Memorial Hospital.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 19, 1965.
